programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the contrasting stories of people responding to the traumas of the Second World War. While Kent student Daphne Baker set her heart on becoming a head teacher as her contribution to the war effort, conman Neville Heath embarked on a fraudulent spree preying on vulnerable women.(n)

programme.title: Dear Murderer (1947)
programme.desc: A man believes he has committed the perfect crime when he kills his wife's two lovers in a jealous rage. Melodrama, starring Eric Portman, Dennis Price, Jack Warner, Greta Gynt and Hazel Court.(n)

programme.title: The Fast Lady (1963)
programme.desc: A cycling enthusiast on a modest civil servant's salary gives up his beloved bike to a buy a luxury car to impress a local magistrate's daughter. Comedy, with Julie Christie, Stanley Baker, James Robertson Justice, Leslie Phillips and Dick Emery.(n)

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: A property developer's plans for a hi-tech bachelor pad in Battersea grind to a halt after he starts building without his neighbours' permission. programme.desc: Andrew White walks from Banavie to Gairlocky and around the Ribblehead Viaduct.(n)

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely.(n)

programme.title: Filthy Cities
programme.desc: Dan Snow embarks on a grime-filled journey through the histories of three of the world's leading modern cities. He begins with London, using CGI footage and re-enactments to experience life in the capital in the 14th century. He spends a night as a medieval muck-raker, and tries on a pair of wooden platform shoes designed to elevate the wearer above the filth that covered the streets.(n)

programme.title: Meet the Lords
programme.desc: The Government threatens to trim the Lords' powers if they rebel again and Lord Strathclyde publishes his review into the powers the upper house have to block legislation. Cameras follow Labour peer Alf Dubs as he attempts to push through an amendment to the Immigration Bill to allow unaccompanied refugee children into the country, while Admiral Alan West isn't happy about a public poll that has voted overwhelmingly to name a new polar research ship Boaty McBoatface and raises a question about it.(n)

programme.title: Victim (1961)
programme.desc: A secretly gay barrister discovers his lover has been driven to suicide by blackmailers, who have also extorted money from several other men. Risking his reputation and marriage, he hunts down the culprits, fully aware that it could lead to his own exposure as a homosexual, illegal at the time. Drama, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylvia Syms, Dennis Price and Anthony Nicholls.(n)

programme.title: Whistle Down the Wind (1961)
programme.desc: Three children become convinced that a bearded murderer taking refuge in the barn on their Lancashire farm is Jesus Christ, and do their utmost to protect him and conceal his presence from the outside world. Drama, based on the novel by Mary Hayley Bell, starring Alan Bates, Hayley Mills, Bernard Lee and Norman Bird.(n)

programme.title: Friend or Foe (1982)
programme.desc: Two Second World War evacuees face a dilemma when they meet a German pilot who has been shot down. Family drama, starring John Bardon and Stacey Tendeter.(n)

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Medical journalist Michael Mosley and a team of doctors offer advice on health, using their expertise and the latest research to investigate the truth behind various claims being made in the media. Surgeon Gabriel Weston takes part in an experiment at the University of Surrey's Sleep Research Centre to discover whether an extra hour in bed could have major benefits, while A&E specialist Dr Saleyha Ahsan asks if people can be overweight and still healthy, and tests the accuracy of two different methods used to assess fatness.(n)

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: Observational documentary revealing the inner workings of Oxford Street, following police and paramedics as they keep the public safe, as well as the staff in the shops and on the underground.(n)

programme.title: The Repo Man
programme.desc: Part two of two. Bailiff Sean James repossesses cars belonging to debtors who have taken out high-interest logbook loans and failed to keep up their repayments. During the worst snowfall in 30 years, he spots an opportunity to carry out his work while most people are stranded in their homes, and the programme meets those who fight tooth and nail to keep their vehicles, as well as drivers who have unknowingly bought cars with debt attached.(n)

programme.title: Cardboard Gangsters (2017)
programme.desc: A gang of lads selling drugs in Darndale in Dublin's Northside sets out to gain more money and power and enter the big leagues of the narcotics trade. Things begin to unravel quickly as not everyone in the area is willing to let them achieve the notoriety they crave without a fight. Thriller, starring John Connors and Fionn Walton.(n)

programme.title: Red Army Hooligans (2018)
programme.desc: The leader of a hooligan gang sustains a head injury in a fight with a Russian rival, that could bring an end to his life of violence. programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: How southerners reacted to the threat of Hitler's V1 flying bombs, which killed 452 people in a week at one point in the campaign. Notoriously inaccurate, the doodlebugs often fell short of their target and hit villages along the south coast from Kent to Dorset, prompting thousands in Chiselhurst to start living in caves.(n)

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Chester to learn about an experiment to find out whether standing up a few more hours each day could have major health benefits. Gabriel Weston witnesses a womb transplant, Saleyha Ahsan shows how to stop someone choking and Chris van Tulleken finds out if vitamin supplements are important to wellbeing.(n)

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent.(n)

programme.title: A Random Encounter (2013)
programme.desc: Two strangers trying to make their way in Hollywood meet by chance in a coffee shop, and come away unable to stop thinking about one another. However, they both soon discover that they have no way of tracking the other down. Romantic comedy, starring Abby Wathen, Michael Rady, Meghan Markle and Sean Young.(n)

programme.title: Kidnapping Freddy Heineken (2015)
programme.desc: Five men struggling to make ends meet decide to kidnap a beer tycoon who is one of Europe's richest men. The plan is a success, and they demand the biggest ransom in history - but tensions within the group threaten their chances of escaping the law. Fact-based crime drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Jim Sturgess and Sam Worthington.(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner.(n)

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Duckworths throw a birthday party for Tommy. Don offers an olive branch to Nick. Des phones Steph up and invites her round.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim and Frank row about him cancelling her credit card. Ned insists Dave stays away from them as his actions could see them lose the farm. Seth is attacked by two poachers.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Seth lies injured where the poachers left him. Mandy is determined to apply for Frank's housekeeper's job. Emma has a shock in store for Zoe.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Mason thwarts a gang of safe-robbers and finds a bag of explosives in their abandoned van - but when the haul ends up in the wrong hands, it could spell disaster for Dawn's birthday party. Meanwhile, there are embarrassing consequences for Oscar when he investigates Wetherby's mysterious lunchtime disappearances. Guest starring James Gaddas, with Joe McFadden, Derek Fowlds and Rupert Ward-Lewis.(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: When their house is subjected to a compulsory purchase order, the Ropers swap urban surroundings for suburbia, where Mildred dreams of climbing the social ladder. George, on the other hand, wants to maintain as low a profile as possible. First episode of the sitcom, starring Yootha Joyce and Brian Murphy.(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: The Ropers meet their new neighbours' dog, and George discusses politics with his local MP. Comedy, starring Yootha Joyce and Brian Murphy.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.sub-title: Two Foot Two, Eyes of Blue
programme.desc: Robin and Chrissy go babysitting, but the baby will not stop crying, and the drinks cupboard is locked. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan and Paula Wilcox.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth falls victim to depression after failing to prevent the murder of a society girl by notorious art thief Marrascaud. His confidence shattered, Poirot eventually returns to work when a lonely chauffeur begs him to find his missing soulmate, the maid of a famous Russian dancer. The investigation takes him to the Swiss Alps, where, against all odds, he stumbles upon a hotel thought to be Marrascaud's hideout - leading to a very personal showdown. The penultimate episode of the long-running detective drama, starring David Suchet, with Simon Callow, Orla Brady, Patrick Ryecart, Nigel Lindsay, Morven Christie, Tom Austen and Rupert Evans.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The arrival of a traumatised and wounded stranger in Aidensfield coincides with the discovery of a woman's body on the moors, and sets off a treacherous chain of events that leaves one long-time resident's life hanging in the balance. Nicholas Farrell and Clare Holman guest star in the last-ever episode of the long-running police drama.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Tina is sceptical about Mandy's chances of getting the housekeeper's job. Zak is confident he can beat Arthur 'The Destroyer' Simpkins. An angry Zoe confronts Kim.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Ned is proud of Jan for attacking Kim. Zak frightens Eric into giving him a share of the profits from the fight. Zoe tells Frank about the church blessing.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Phyllis warns Des against getting involved with Steph again. Betty finds her house ransacked by burglars. Leo asks Raquel out for dinner.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maxine spends the night at Des's. Don tells Martin he intends to fight Gail to keep his home. Raquel is thrilled when Leo asks her out again. Steph turns up to see Des.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: David Suchet takes on his final case as the Belgian sleuth in the last-ever episode of the long-running drama. Crippled with arthritis, Poirot is now using a wheelchair and has a life-threatening heart condition, but remains as sharp as ever. Calling on old friend Captain Hastings for assistance, he returns to Styles, where the pair first met 30 years earlier on a murder investigation. The detective is convinced the country house is once again harbouring a killer, and as guests fall victim to a mysterious attacker, he must summon the last of his strength to battle his ultimate nemesis. With Hugh Fraser, Anne Reid, Philip Glenister, Helen Baxendale, Matthew McNulty, Anna Madeley and Shaun Dingwall.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The arrival of a traumatised and wounded stranger in Aidensfield coincides with the discovery of a woman's body on the moors, and sets off a treacherous chain of events that leaves one long-time resident's life hanging in the balance. Nicholas Farrell and Clare Holman guest star in the last-ever episode of the long-running police drama.(n)

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: As the village prepares for the annual flower show, Isobel finds herself in conflict with Violet, and Mary is introduced to a potential suitor, but it would seem she only has eyes for Matthew. Anna realises who is to blame when a valuable snuff box goes missing, and Mrs Patmore tearfully reveals her fears to Carson that her career may be coming to an end. Meanwhile, O'Brien engineers a way for Edith to take revenge on Mary. Drama, starring Maggie Smith and Robert Bathurst.(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Aunt Joan reveals she has a rare bird nesting on her land but wants to keep it a secret to deter prospective egg thieves. Sure enough, her tactless nephew opens his mouth to the local baker, who spies an opportunity to save his ailing business by making it a new attraction. Before long the peaceful community of Portwenn is over-run by twitchers eager to catch a sight of the bird, and Dr Ellingham finds himself in the locals' bad books yet again. Martin Clunes stars in this Christmas special of the comedy drama, originally shown in 2006.(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a housewife is found hanged in her home, the police initially mark it down as suicide. However, a meeting with an Oxford law professor prompts a sceptical Lewis and Hathaway to believe something more sinister is afoot - a suspicion confirmed by the death of another woman. Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox star.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Lewis joins Morse on a trip to Australia, but it is no holiday - they are pursuing a former supergrass who holds the key to a mystery back in Oxford. Going deep into the heart of the Outback, Morse soon begins to miss the comforts of home, particularly his regular tipple, although Lewis finds he has more in common with his Aussie brethren than he thought. Crime drama, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately and Con O'Neill.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.sub-title: Peril at End House - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Belgian sleuth's Cornish holiday comes to a dramatic conclusion as he unravels the mystery behind the series of disastrous near-misses that placed the life of a beautiful heiress in danger, and as the truth comes to light, a secret engagement is revealed. David Suchet stars, with Philip Jackson and Hugh Fraser.(n)

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: In Moorland, Somerset, Alan Titchmarsh surprises the Colquhouns, a couple devastated by the floods of 2014, which arrived in the wake of a major health problem. Sheila had to undergo treatment for breast cancer, but after moving back home, in the year the couple will retire and celebrate their 40th wedding anniversary, Alan and the team attempt to transform their flood-wrecked garden.(n)

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team head for rural Cornwall, where they create a spectacular contemporary garden for Chris Finney, a former serviceman who was awarded the George Cross in 2003. A space age-inspired area - complete with solar dome - will test Chris's knowledge as a novice gardener, and provide a stimulating haven for his young family.(n)

programme.sub-title: The Case of the Missing Will
programme.desc: The sleuth sets out to solve the baffling murder of a Cambridge don who met with foul play shortly after deciding to change his will. Starring David Suchet, Beth Goddard and Mark Kingston.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The mysterious death of a former police commissioner forces a reluctant Morse to team up with old professional rival Chief Inspector Dawson. As they and Sergeant Lewis begin to investigate, a link is uncovered to the unsolved case of a girl murdered 18 years previously. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately, Kenneth Colley and Christopher Eccleston.(n)

programme.title: Carry On Up the Jungle (1970)
programme.desc: A Victorian explorer recalls how he was recruited by an aristocrat to find her missing son in the African jungle. Teaming up with a fearless hunter, he hoped to find a rare bird on his journey - but instead fell into the clutches of an all-female tribe. Comedy, starring Sid James, Frankie Howerd, Joan Sims, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey and Terry Scott.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The fatal poisoning of a deaconess who was about to become Oxford's first female chaplain makes Morse wonder whether the city's conservative clerics could be hiding a deadly secret. Further investigation uncovers a connection between the murder and a weight loss clinic. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately and Zoe Wanamaker (My Family).(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Bullard asks Barnaby to investigate the disappearance of a friend's daughter who was a member of the Oblong Foundation, a cult based at Malham Hall. Jones goes under cover as a new recruit to solve the mystery, but he and Barnaby soon start digging into an old case involving the death of a couple in a boat explosion, which could be linked to the missing woman. Detective drama, starring Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes, with Will Knightley, Kevin Doyle, Holly Aird, Barbara Flynn and John Woodvine.(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.sub-title: ITV3 Most Wanted - A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The 'Most Wanted' episode of A Touch of Frost, starring David Jason as the titular detective, based on the character created in the novels of RD Wingfield. The series ran from 1992 to 2010, and viewers can take their pick from the 42 episodes filmed.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A depressive gambler is found dead, the apparent victim of suicide. Dr Jane Moore, who once treated the man, is adamant he wouldn't have taken his own life - a theory backed up by the post-mortem. Thrilled to be working with Jane again, Barnaby investigates the case - and it isn't long before another of the doctor's patients is killed. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, Isla Blair, Jan Ravens and Daniel Casey.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Julia McKenzie returns as the sleuthing spinster in the first of three murder mysteries. While staying at a hotel in the Caribbean, Miss Marple investigates the death of a fellow guest, refusing to believe he died of a heart attack. With the help of a business tycoon she sets about finding the real cause of the man's demise, and is soon drawn into a web of deceit and dark magic. Adapted by Charlie Higson and co-starring Antony Sher, Robert Webb, Montserrat Lombard, Daniel Rigby, Hermione Norris, MyAnna Buring, Warren Brown and Oliver Ford Davies.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse

But as investigations progress, he discovers the victim was not quite the lovable rogue he initially appeared. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately, Geraldine James and Freddie Jones.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford sleuth investigates a double mystery connected to the local Greek community - the death of a restaurant chef and the disappearance of a baby - and wonders whether an academic event attended by some of the university's leading classical scholars could shed light on the case. Mystery, starring John Thaw and Kevin Whately, with Jan Harvey, Martin Jarvis and James Hazeldine.(n)

programme.title: Carry On Up the Khyber (1968)
programme.desc: British forces in colonial India find themselves in deep trouble when a manic local ruler discovers the soldiers' fearsome reputation is thoroughly undeserved - prompting open rebellion. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Roy Castle, Joan Sims, Bernard Bresslaw and Terry Scott.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.sub-title: Peril at End House - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. While holidaying in Cornwall with his friend Captain Hastings, the sleuth meets a local woman who has seemingly become unaccountably accident-prone - but soon starts to suspect she is actually a victim of foul play. David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.sub-title: Peril at End House - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Belgian sleuth's Cornish holiday comes to a dramatic conclusion as he unravels the mystery behind the series of disastrous near-misses that placed the life of a beautiful heiress in danger, and as the truth comes to light, a secret engagement is revealed. David Suchet stars, with Philip Jackson and Hugh Fraser.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: John Barnaby arrives in Midsomer and the headmistress of an upmarket girls' boarding school wastes no time in asking him to patrol a forthcoming classic-car show. However, when the local DJ who was set to judge the vehicles is crushed to death, the detective is soon investigating his first murder case since replacing cousin Tom - and as the death toll rises, he finds himself in a perilous situation. Drama, guest starring David Warner and Samantha Bond, with Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: After enjoying a trip to the theatre with Captain Hastings, the detective is disturbed by the sound of gunshots in an apartment at Whitehaven Mansions, and soon finds himself investigating a murder. Drama, starring David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Gerald Hadleigh, the secretary of the local writers' circle in the tranquil village of Midsomer Worthy, is found battered to death on the eve of a visit by a best-selling novelist. Barnaby and Troy discover Hadleigh was a mystery man, with no relatives or marriage certificate to match the wedding photo on display in his house. To make matters worse, another body is then found. Mystery, guest starring Anna Massey and Una Stubbs.(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: A senator heading an investigation on organised crime is threatened by figures determined to silence him, so Harry and the Contessa are assigned to keep him under surveillance.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A racehorse owner is accused of killing both his champion thoroughbred and its vet, prompting old friend Quincy to track down the real culprit.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A nun seeks revenge on an airline boss she believes is responsible for her sister's death, and ends up in the middle of a dangerous battle of wills between Theo and the Mob.(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of an aristocrat's butler, whose erudition seems strangely at odds with his lowly occupation, presents Holmes with a fresh mystery to solve. The key to the case lies in an ancient family ritual - and points the way to a historic treasure. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur gives up smoking and drinking on doctor's orders, and soon appears to lose his grip on reality, demanding the police protect him from an apparently non-existent angry customer. George Cole and Gary Webster star.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle is shot by an intruder in his flat, and enters a near coma. Cowley fears a terrorist group - two of whose members were blown up during a recent car chase by CI5 - is responsible. While Doyle experiences surreal dreams involving a ghostly graveyard, Cowley and Bodie attempt to pursue the villain behind the attack. Action drama, with Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad foils the hijacking of a security truck before attempting to learn the identity of an informer. Colin Welland guest stars in the hard-hitting police drama, alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: After the death of a truck driver, the coroner investigates illegally dumped hazardous waste threatening the lives of people whose homes are nearby.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.sub-title: The Queen of Hearts Is Wild
programme.desc: A woman is the only witness to the murder of a police officer, but her gangster boyfriend is an old enemy of Theo, and tries to intimidate her into keeping quiet.(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Captain Jack Crocker, a robust seafaring man, is implicated in the murder of beautiful aristocrat Lady Brackenstall's abusive husband. Drama, guest starring Oliver Tobias, with Jeremy Brett, Edward Hardwicke and Anne Louise Lambert.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.sub-title: A Bird in the Hand Is Worth Two in Shepherd's Bush
programme.desc: While Arthur is away on business in Europe, Ray is given the task of guarding a valuable racing pigeon - but does not appear to have his mind on the job. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are assigned to prompt Arab cultural attache and assassin Rahad into carrying out a murderous deed, in the hope they can catch him red-handed just before he commits the act and force him out of the country. Comedy actor John Junkin guests stars alongside Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: With Haskins in Toronto, his stand-in DCI Quirk (guest star Bill Maynard) becomes obsessed with catching a gang of thieves. When information is received suggesting the crooks are about to rob a jeweller's shop, officers are poised for action, but events take an unexpected turn as the informant seemingly has a score to settle with Quirk first. Hard-hitting police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: Brian Moore Meets
programme.desc: A classic 1981 interview with the golf legend, who was then at the peak of his powers at the age of 22. Moore travels to Seve's home town of Pedrana in Northern Spain to find out about his upbringing and examines his single-minded pursuit of excellence.(n)

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Gun (1974)
programme.desc: James Bond's investigation into the death of a world-renowned scientist working on solar technology draws him into a battle of wits with a stealthy assassin, who dispatches his victims with a golden bullet and has the British secret agent next in his sights. Spy adventure, starring Roger Moore, Christopher Lee, Britt Ekland and Maud Adams.(n)

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi, Tom Dove and Neil Spooner head to Bosnia, seeing how the country has recovered from war and fishing for huge carp in a well-stocked lake. First stop though is a bit of predator fishing in neighbouring Serbia, before a long drive gives them a chance to see parts of both countries, and how they have recovered after the conflict in the 1990s.(n)

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Action from the opening day of the 1976/77 season, featuring Arsenal v Bristol City and Ipswich Town v Tottenham Hotspur.(n)

programme.title: Brian Moore Meets
programme.desc: A classic 1979 interview with the former striker during his time at Hamburg SV. Keegan had recently been crowned European Footballer of the Year, and cameras reveal how he was ahead of his time in terms of realising his commercial potential.(n)

programme.title: Brian Moore Meets
programme.desc: A classic 1979 interview with the Formula One legend, who survived a life-threatening crash in 1976 and returned just three weeks later. The programme provides a revealing portrait of one of motorsport's most respected figures, who died last year.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A recently released convict causes chaos when he takes a group of hospital patients hostage. Bodie and Doyle try to get to him before he can start shooting. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson.(n)

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes disguises himself as a plumber to gain access to the home of a blackmailing art dealer who targets members of high society. Robert Hardy guest stars in a feature-length episode of the period drama, with Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke.(n)

programme.title: Rooster Cogburn (1975)
programme.desc: The former marshal returns to duty to track down outlaws who have stolen a shipment of explosives and gone on the rampage in a quiet town. However, the stubborn daughter of a preacher killed by the bandits insists on joining him so she can avenge her father's death. Western, starring John Wayne reprising his role from the original 1969 version of True Grit, with Katharine Hepburn and Anthony Zerbe.(n)

programme.title: Banks of England
programme.desc: A celebration of the life of former England goalkeeper Gordon Banks, who won the World Cup in 1966, and was also remembered for a sensational save from Pele in the tournament four years later. Featuring insights from past and present players, as well as Banks himself.(n)

programme.title: Euro 96 Relived
programme.desc: A chance to see the quarter-final, which took place at Wembley Stadium. England were looking to move a step closer to emulating their 1966 World cup triumph when they last hosted a major tournament, and Stuart Pearce and David Seaman were to play key roles. Jim Rosenthal presented the coverage, with analysis from Jack Charlton, Ray Wilkins and Gary McAllister.(n)

programme.title: A Fistful of Dollars (1964)
programme.desc: A mysterious gunslinger rides into a town on the Mexican border divided by two warring families. After killing the henchmen of one clan, he seems to have made it clear where his loyalties lie and is hired by their rivals. However, he is secretly planning to play them off against each other to his own advantage. Sergio Leone's Western, with Clint Eastwood making his first appearance as The Man with No Name alongside Gian Maria Volonte and Marianne Koch.(n)

programme.title: Brian Moore Meets
programme.desc: A classic 1980 interview with former tennis star Bjorn Borg, as he prepared to defend his Wimbledon title for the fifth consecutive year. Cameras capture Borg's glamorous but exhausting lifestyle and also reveals how his upbringing helped to mould his ice-cold on-court persona.(n)

programme.title: Brian Moore Meets
programme.desc: A classic 1981 interview with the golf legend, who was then at the peak of his powers at the age of 22. Moore travels to Seve's home town of Pedrana in Northern Spain to find out about his upbringing and examines his single-minded pursuit of excellence.(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The youthful heir to a fortune disappears from boarding school in the dead of night - but his aristocratic father's aversion to publicity makes the case particularly difficult to investigate. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett.(n)

programme.title: Aces High (1976)
programme.desc: A new recruit is proud to join the Royal Flying Corps' elite 76 Squadron under the command of a renowned ace, but is shocked to discover his superior officer has turned to drink as the high fatalities among his men take their toll - with devastating consequences for the pilots. First World War drama, starring Malcolm McDowell, Christopher Plummer, Simon Ward and Peter Firth.(n)

programme.title: The Cowboys (1972)
programme.desc: An ageing rancher finds himself short-handed when his workers abandon him during a gold rush, and grudgingly hires a group of schoolboys to help him on a 400-mile cattle drive. Although at first they feel out of their depth, the youngsters quickly learn to work like men - but face a dangerous challenge ahead as a gang of rustlers begins to stalk them. Western, with John Wayne, Roscoe Lee Browne and Bruce Dern.(n)

programme.title: Guns of the Magnificent Seven (1969)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles persuades Daphne's hard-drinking father to call on her mother in Seattle, hoping he can inspire them to start afresh. Meanwhile, Frasier and Roz reflect on their night together. Comedy, guest starring Brian Cox.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne impulsively marry while holidaying in Reno, but on their return they realise Frasier, Martin and Daphne's mother will be distraught if they find out they missed the event. Starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from in and around Belfast, where the first host is chatty PR manager Claire. She aims to impress with a menu made up of her favourite restaurant dishes, but never having plucked a pheasant before, she has a challenge on her hands. The guests she's hoping to impress are DJ Ryan, joiner and part-time inventor Neil, charity events manager Cailin, and window cleaning manager Paul, on a lively night filled with laughter, music and dancing.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carpenter Neil hosts the second dinner party in and around Belfast in a bid to win the £1000 prize, presenting good old fashioned, country style cuisine to his guests. With a farmyard full of animals joining in the fun, discussions ranging from disabled chickens to eating stinging nettles and a guest performance from Neil's very own creation, ''head in a jar', it's proves to be a weird and wonderful experience out in the countryside.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Debonair window cleaning business owner and keen golfer Paul has cut a dash already this week in and around Belfast with his sense of style, and now he hopes to impress with his fine food. For Ryan and Neil, most of the fancy fare is uncharted territory, and while Cailin and Claire are impressed with the fine dining, Paul sails close to the wind when he suggests that they might like to be his ladies-in-waiting.(n)

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes news headlines, sport and weather.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Livewire DJ and events organiser Ryan is the next to host in and around Belfast - and having arranged parties for thousands, is confident he can satisfy four fellow diners. Eccentric joiner Neil anticipates a madcap evening of fun, and with a hipster band playing in the living room, unexpected discoveries in the bedroom and several crises in the kitchen, certainly gets the entertainment he was hoping for.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Belfast, Cailin hosts a Eurovision extravaganza. Her rivals have provided top-notch nosh and entertainment, but she believes that her tried-and-tested dishes from across Europe will land her the top spot.(n)

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Sharon and Shaun Garner help Debbie from Buckingham to find a holiday home in Almeria. Ian Cochrane from Fife turns to Linda Rodriguez and her daughter Charlotte - a property tour novice - for help in his search for a property in Alicante province.(n)

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley present the words-and-numbers game, with guest Margaret Mountford joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

They would ideally like a property with three bedrooms for when their family come to visit. Danni Menzies has five options for their £150,000 budget, but whether the couple will be impressed enough to put in an offer remains to be seen.(n)

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: It's a big day for the vets and volunteers, as Harriet is called out to an emergency operation on an elephant whose leg has been wounded by a poacher's snare. Volunteer Debbie is put to the test as nine orphaned baby monkeys arrive at once, and Emma becomes surrogate mum to three-week-old baby hippo, Hector.(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bromley, south-east London, Jo and her discerning foodie partner Alex kick off proceedings with a fine dining menu but the guests are not impressed. Day two sees Ryan and Julie go back to their roots cooking up an Americana menu, but the food fails to wow with Michelle comparing the main course to vomit. Finally it's the turn of Michelle and confident Craig, who give their guests a taste of the Caribbean.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes up ice hockey and proves so good at the game that she completely transforms her ailing team's fortunes. Dismayed at being outshone by a girl, Bart tries to compensate by becoming a teacher's pet - only to be beaten up by bullies.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Channel 4 News

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.sub-title: Ali G Night: Da Best of Ali G

programme.title: Da Ali G Show

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert contemplates leaving the police force to take up a job selling security systems, but the proposal receives a mixed reaction, leading to tense celebrations at his birthday party. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Brad Garrett and Patricia Heaton.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is delighted to be awarded an honorary doctorate, but hurts Debra's feelings by thanking everyone except her in his acceptance speech. He claims it was an accident, though she takes the opportunity to remind him of past snubs that were obviously deliberate.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's parents draw attention to Robert's strange eating habits, making him feel self-conscious every time he sits down for a meal - so Debra devises a plan to cure him once and for all. Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Brad Garrett star.(n)

programme.desc: The guys' science skills are put to the test when they get a flat tyre during Leonard's surprise bachelor party weekend in Mexico. Meanwhile, the girls finally force Penny to break the news to her family that she has eloped with Leonard. Keith Carradine guest stars.(n)

programme.desc: Penny and Leonard announce that they are moving in together, prompting Sheldon to revisit 2003, a much simpler time before he had met either of them. Howard and Raj form a band to play at the comic-book store, only to fall out over musical differences.(n)

programme.desc: The boys want to become more sporty, so Barry Kripke leads them in a fencing lesson, while Penny, Amy and Bernadette help Stuart, who wants to attract more female customers to the comic-book store.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is horrified at Marge's attempts to make him befriend Ralph Wiggum - until he learns his police chief dad has a master key to every shop in Springfield.(n)

programme.desc: The death of Grampa's old army friend reveals the whereabouts of priceless pictures looted during the Second World War, and Bart is asked to help recover the collection before Mr Burns gets his hands on it.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family takes a relaxing break in Ned Flanders' beach house, where Lisa starts to feel lonely and decides to change her image in a bid to make friends - but Bart does his best to ensure she fails. Featuring the guest voice of Christina Ricci.(n)

Now Gordon tries to turn things around before the floundering business ruins their marriage and tears their family apart.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Inn at the Park in Aberdeen, where owners Ronnie and Steph Caird hope to impress their guests and be named best value for money at the end of the week.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Renfrewshire and Ingliston Country Club, where events manager Shaunna Kirk and sales manager Fiona Gallagher are a force to be reckoned with.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit, the group heads to 1692 Wasdale in the Lake District, where owners Steve and Allard Newell have proudly built their B&B from the ground up.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests stay at the Lynbar Hotel in Blackpool, where Ronnie and Steph have parking problems, while confident owner John O'Donnell boasts of serving the best breakfast in town.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to settle some scores. Inn at the Park owners Ronnie and Steph Caird are intent on clearing up John's issues with the toilet.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps a South Wales woman find a holiday home for her and her partner in the Costa Tropical, southern Spain, showing her five properties for her budget of £200,000.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits a home built on an airfield in Strathaven in Scotland to check on the progress made by Colin MacKinnon and his partner Marta Briongos. Their ambitious plan was to build a metal-sculptural home inspired by aircraft hangars right next to the runway, but the difficulties of building their elegant design saw a year-long project stretch to three years.(n)

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather.(n)

programme.title: Old People's Home for 4 Year Olds
programme.desc: Ten four year olds are half way through an ambitious six-week experiment, as they share their classroom with 11 pensioners who all follow the same timetable in a nursery near Bristol. Has the energy and activities of the younger group had a measurable impact on the pensioners? Can this ambitious experiment transform the way Britain cares for its increasingly older population?(n)

programme.title: Dunkirk: The New Evidence
programme.desc: Documentary examining the famous Second World War evacuation of Allied soldiers - codenamed Operation Dynamo - from the beaches of Dunkirk, France, between May 26 and June 4, 1940. Recently released Ministry of Defence files reveal that, far from being absent as many historians have believed, the RAF was suffering massive losses supporting the evacuation. Operating at high altitude and deep inside France, RAF planes were halting the bulk of Luftwaffe bombers before they could reach the beaches. The files also reveal that the famous Spitfire took flight for the first time during the mission, and the agile fighter was a spectacular success.(n)

programme.title: Dunkirk: The Forgotten Heroes
programme.desc: The untold story of what happened after the Dunkirk evacuation, told by the men who were there and using recently declassified secret documents. Following the evacuation, tens of thousands of British troops were still left in France, fighting for their lives. The 51st Highland Division were ordered to fight on against the Hitler's war machine and now, almost 80 years later, the only remaining survivors of that Division tell their extraordinary story for the first time.(n)

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3 (2017)
programme.desc: Following their win at the world championship, the now-separated Bellas reunite for one last singing competition at an overseas USO tour, but face a group who uses both instruments and voices. Comedy sequel, starring Anna Kendrick, Rebel Wilson and Brittany Snow.(n)

programme.title: Slumdog Millionaire (2008)
programme.desc: An uneducated teenager from the Mumbai slums is only one question away from winning a quiz show, but the authorities are reluctant to believe a youngster from such a humble background could succeed without cheating. Under questioning, he tells a police inspector the eventful story of his life - and how he came to know so much. Danny Boyle's Oscar-winning drama, starring Dev Patel and Freida Pinto. Being shown as a tribute to the late Irrfan Khan, who played the police inspector.(n)

programme.title: The Last Leg: Locked Down Under
programme.desc: Things are far from normal as the Bafta-nominated entertainment show continues its re-fashioned series for lockdown. Due to complications following a stomach operation, he hasn't been able to restore the car himself and it has been sitting neglected in a garage for nearly two decades. With Fuzz Townshend battling to start the Jag's engine and Tim Shaw having to get his hands dirty making parts, it's a race against the clock to get this British classic finished on time.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is upset to hear Debra has been discussing intimate details of their marriage with her gossipy friends - and responds by revealing a few secrets of his own. Guest starring Maggie Wheeler (Friends).(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast

On the menu is a seafood feast of pan-seared cod wrapped in Iberico ham, with smoked almonds, clams, fennel marmalade, olives and baby courgette. Jamie whips up a delicious katsu curry, while Jimmy's DIY skills come in handy as he creates a chocolate fountain for his brother's wedding. The hosts also look to crack the problem of using eggs from caged hens once and for all.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Apu has the bright idea of turning the Kwik-E-Mart into a novel money-spinning tourist attraction, while Lisa is struck by the awful thought that her genetic make-up means she will follow in her family's footsteps and end up stupid.(n)

programme.title: Megamind (2010)

programme.title: Penelope Keith's Hidden Villages
programme.desc: The actress is in Devon and Cornwall as she explores more of the nation's smallest communities. It's a land of rugged coastal communities and distinct identities forged over centuries, but also a region visited by five million people each year. Penelope travels to a former silver-mining village, a cliff-edge fishing village, the most exposed theatre in the country, and the small communities near Fowey Harbour.(n)

programme.title: Channel 4 News

programme.title: Walking with Elephants
programme.desc: Levison Wood reaches the final stage of his epic 650-mile journey, following the annual migration of Botswana's 130,000 elephants. Together with his guide Kane, Lev follows the elephants deep into the heart of the Okavango Delta, a vast wetland teeming with wildlife where every year more than 40,000 elephants gather to feed. Lev and Kane narrowly avoid a pride of lions who have brought down a male buffalo and watch as they move in for the kill, but are forced to wade through wide channels where crocodiles, hippos and snakes lurk.(n)

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.sub-title: Hitler's Invisible U-Boat: Draining the Ocean
programme.desc: Marine archaeologists and historians go in search of Hitler's secrets, hidden deep underwater, revealing how the Nazis waged a secret war across the world's oceans. This documentary uses CGI graphics to drain the oceans and investigate the lost wrecks of the Second World War.(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Beginning in the mountaintop town of Creel, the Chihuahua Pacifico Express - or El Chepe for short - winds its way through the Tarahumara Mountains, home to the reclusive Raramuri people. Divisadero, Mexico's most panoramic station, offers the first glimpse of Copper Canyon. Created by six separate yet conjoined gorges, it is four times the size of the Grand Canyon. The train continues on to the Urique Canyon, which at 6,200ft deep it is the deepest in North America. The final leg crosses the state of Sinaloa, Mexico's breadbasket, before reaching Los Mochis and the gateway to the Pacific Ocean. Narrated by Bill Nighy.(n)

programme.title: Portillo's Empire Journey
programme.desc: Michael Portillo visits Jamaica, the Caribbean capital of the Empire, heading to Fort Charles where the Empire enlisted the help of pirates to defend the new territory from the Spanish. At the old naval headquarters, Michael learns how the Royal Navy moved in to replace the pirates as Britain struck a deal with Spain to keep her territories. The island needed a new source of wealth, and found it in the triangular trade as slaves were shipped from Africa to work sugar plantations. In Pinnacle, birthplace of the Rastafari movement, Michael learns how Jamaicans were later inspired to create a new religion.(n)

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.sub-title: When Comedy Shows Go Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Julian Clary narrates a compilation of disastrous mishaps from comedy shows. Featuring a stunt fight that ended badly for comedian Russell Howard, an incident that left Tony Hancock determined to never perform live again, and a rare outtake from Tom, Dick and Harriet. That long-forgotten sitcom from 1982 and 1983 featured former Return of the Saint star Ian Ogilvy and actor/director Lionel Jeffries. Their stunt involving a partly submerged car could have ended in disaster.(n)

programme.desc: The singer heads off round the Caribbean in mega cruise ship MSC Divina. She and her fellow passengers stop off in Nassau in the Bahamas, where Jane finds solace in the state's oldest Baptist church, and St Martin, where she seeks an intimate underwater audience with a host of sharks. Back on board, Jane is startled by the scale of everything - from the food and activities to the sheer number of people.(n)

programme.title: The Royal Family at War
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary charting the scandalous love affairs, bitter disputes and royal rifts throughout the history of the monarchy. They include the public marriage breakdown of Prince Charles and Diana, Princess of Wales, and rumours of a feud between the duchesses of Sussex and Cambridge. Plus, the crisis caused by Edward VIII's abdication in 1936 - and the details of the row between his bride Wallis Simpson and the Queen Mother.(n)

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: Two Troubled Years
programme.desc: A look at the events that led to the Duke and Duchess of Sussex stepping back from their roles as senior members of the royal family and split their time between the UK and North America. When Meghan married Harry, she also married everything that went with it. However, it soon became evident that there were issues, that eventually led to the bombshell split. Even as they start their new life, their battle with the tabloids is continuing and getting even more bitter. Will the Sussexes manage to make a go of it outside the firm?(n)

programme.title: The Story of
programme.sub-title: Paul O'Grady: 25 Years of Sweet & Savage
programme.desc: Profile of the talk show host, exploring his youth in Birkenhead and formative years facing a challenging career as a social worker. The programme looks back at his rise to fame in the guise of drag act alter ego Lily Savage, before shedding his make-up to emerge as a beloved presenter in his own right, presenting a series of award-winning chat shows and documentaries.(n)

programme.title: Funny Women
programme.desc: A look back at the astonishing 50-year career of the queen of comedy. Clips from Joan's unique, shocking and blisteringly funny routines from the '60s and '70s on the Johnny Carson, Ed Sullivan and Carol Burnett shows, reveal how she smashed down doors and shattered glass ceilings for a new generation of female performers. Joan was also an astute businesswoman who made millions investing in QVC, plus she almost single-handedly changed how the world watches the red carpet. Contributors, including her daughter Melissa and comedian Barry Cryer, celebrate the comedian's life and times.(n)

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle Enigma: Revealed
programme.desc: Documentary about the area of the north Atlantic between Florida, Puerto Rico and Bermuda where it is alleged many boats and aeroplanes have gone missing. Stories about strange events in the region include a US Coast Guard ship that detected a phantom landmass on its radar, two 'ghost rockets' that flew silently over a US Navy ship and Russian submarines that reported all manner of bizarre activity. There are interviews with some of the leading experts on this mystery, air traffic controllers Bob Greene and Bob Gish, pilots Bruce Gernon and Fred Grieser, underwater explorers Evan Kovacs and Les Savege and weather expert Dr Stephen Leatherman.(n)

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan help illusionist James in Dorset, who has neglected his career, his life, and his home following the recent loss of his parents.(n)

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House

Claire and her five children will see their weekly budget increase from £171 to a massive £3,000, while Rana is hoping the swap will give her children a taste of her own upbringing in Syria.(n)

programme.title: Most Shocking Celebrity Moments
programme.sub-title: Most Shocking TV Moments of the 90s
programme.desc: A countdown of infamous incidents from the 1990s, including actor Hugh Grant's arrest in Los Angeles and OJ Simpson's murder trial. The programme also looks back at Manchester United star Eric Cantona kicking a fan during a match against Crystal Palace, Pulp frontman Jarvis Cocker interrupting Michael Jackson's performance at the Brit awards, and footballer David Beckham's lavish wedding to Victoria Adams of the Spice Girls. Featuring contributions from Louis Walsh, Shaun Ryder, Bez, Michael Burke, Darren Day, Gail Porter, Tim Vincent, Liz McClarnon and Kerry Katona.(n)

programme.title: Sorry, Wrong Number (1948)
programme.desc: Rich, neurotic Leona Stevenson lies bedridden at home and is trying to phone her husband. But the lines are crossed, and she accidentally overhears a call in which two men are planning a murder. She frantically tries to raise the alarm, and when at last she manages to convince the telephone company of her story, she comes to realise with increasing horror who their intended victim is. Thriller, starring Barbara Stanwyck, Burt Lancaster, Ann Richards and Wendell Corey.(n)

programme.title: Destroyer (1943)
programme.desc: A former welder working on the Navy destroyer whose construction he oversaw angers his crewmates with his relentless quest for perfection. Wartime adventure, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford, Marguerite Chapman and Regis Toomey.(n)

programme.title: The Malta Story (1953)
programme.desc: The island of Malta comes under siege during the Second World War, as both Allied and Axis forces see it as vital to their supply lines. A British reconnaissance pilot arrives on the island, and plays a crucial role in defending it from the advancing enemy forces. Drama, starring Alec Guinness, Anthony Steel, Jack Hawkins, Muriel Pavlow and Flora Robson.(n)

programme.title: 40 Guns to Apache Pass (1967)
programme.desc: A cavalry captain sets out to deliver a shipment of rifles to a fort besieged by marauding Apaches, but the mission is undermined by a villainous corporal who plans to steal the weapons and sell them to the enemy. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Michael Burns, Laraine Stephens, Kenneth Tobey and Michael Keep.(n)

programme.title: Home Alone 3 (1997)
programme.desc: Cheeky eight-year-old Alex Pruitt is delighted to be given a remote-controlled toy car by his neighbour - unaware it contains a stolen microchip. A gang of crooks heads to Alex's town with the intention of recovering the valuable item, but the resourceful youngster has prepared for their arrival with a series of nasty booby-traps. Comedy sequel, starring Alex D Linz, Olek Krupa, Rya Kihlstedt and Lenny von Dohlen.(n)

programme.title: Heat (1995)
programme.desc: An armoured car hold-up sets a veteran police detective on the trail of a highly intelligent career criminal, whom he is obsessed with capturing. Meanwhile, the robber is planning an elaborate bank heist as his final job before retiring, and a complex game of cat and mouse develops between the two. Michael Mann's crime thriller, starring Al Pacino, Robert De Niro, Val Kilmer, Jon Voight, Tom Sizemore and Natalie Portman.(n)

programme.title: Momentum (2015)
programme.desc: A retired thief is persuaded to carry out one last diamond heist by her former partner, only to get mixed up in a murder. With a ruthless assassin on her trail, she must unmask the secret conspiracy that has manipulated her into the line of fire. Action thriller, starring Olga Kurylenko, Morgan Freeman and James Purefoy.(n)

programme.title: Last Night (1998)
programme.desc: Inhabitants of Toronto try to make their last six hours meaningful before the end of the world. While a teacher attempts to track down her favourite pupils and a man sets about fulfilling his sexual fantasies, a couple contemplate a suicide pact. Drama, starring Sandra Oh, Callum Keith Rennie and David Cronenberg.(n)

programme.title: Arthur's Hallowed Ground (1986)
programme.desc: A cricket groundsman plans to make the perfect pitch, but soon finds himself fighting a losing battle against his home team, who seem hell-bent on starting a turf war. Comedy drama, starring Jimmy Jewel, David Swift, Vas Blackwood and Michael Elphick.(n)

programme.title: Hotel for Dogs (2009)
programme.desc: An orphaned brother and sister face losing their beloved dog when they go into a foster home that does not allow pets. The kids find the ideal hiding place in an abandoned hotel, and set about transforming it into luxury canine accommodation for not just their beloved pet, but every stray in town. Family comedy, starring Emma Roberts, Jake T Austin, Don Cheadle and Lisa Kudrow.(n)

programme.title: A Dog's Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad.(n)

programme.title: Chasing Mavericks (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager discovers a supposedly legendary stretch of shoreline famous for vast waves actually exists. He tracks down a famous surfer and asks for help in developing his skills to the point where he can successfully ride the challenging waters. Fact-based drama, starring Jonny Weston, Gerard Butler and Elisabeth Shue.(n)

programme.title: Non-Stop (2014)
programme.desc: An air marshal on a transatlantic flight receives mysterious messages in which an anonymous terrorist threatens to kill one passenger every 20 minutes unless a ransom is paid. He searches the plane for the criminals responsible, but his investigation is threatened when he is framed as being the mastermind behind the plot. Action thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Julianne Moore and Lupita Nyong'o.(n)

programme.title: The Green Mile (1999)
programme.desc: A convicted child-killer of towering height and massive build is condemned to death row, but astonishes the guards with his good nature and miraculous healing powers. They believe the gentle giant is incapable of crime, and emotions run high as they realise there is no hope of overturning his death sentence. Supernatural drama, based on a novel by Stephen King, starring Tom Hanks, Michael Clarke Duncan, David Morse and Harry Dean Stanton.(n)

programme.title: Slow West (2015)
programme.desc: A Scottish teenager travels to America at the end of the 19th century. He travels across the frontier in the hope of being reunited with the woman he loves, aided in his travels by a mysterious drifter and stalked through the wilderness by an outlaw. Western, starring Kodi Smit-McPhee and Michael Fassbender.(n)

programme.title: A Young Man with High Potential (2018)
programme.desc: Piet Carnell, a computer science student, has a brilliant mind but is sexually inexperienced. He tries his luck with the bright and beautiful Klara, but is rejected. Distraught, he takes sleeping pills and ends up experiencing one of the wildest nights of his life. Thriller, starring Adam Ild Rohweder and Paulina Galazka.(n)

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes (1979)
programme.desc: An American heiress befriends an elderly lady on a continental train journey, but wakes one morning to find she has disappeared and the other passengers deny having ever seen the missing woman - leading to suspicions that a conspiracy is afoot. Remake of Hitchcock's 1938 mystery, starring Elliott Gould, Cybill Shepherd, Angela Lansbury, Herbert Lom, Arthur Lowe and Ian Carmichael.(n)

programme.title: The Three Stooges (2012)
programme.desc: Three babies left abandoned on an orphanage doorstep grow up into a bungling, accident prone trio of maintenance men. When the children's home is threatened with closure, they try to raise the money to save it, getting drawn into a murder plot and becoming the stars of a reality TV show. Slapstick comedy, with Sean Hayes, Will Sasso and Chris Diamantopoulos.(n)

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.(n)

programme.title: Ice Age: Collision Course (2016)
programme.desc: When a cosmic blunder leaves Earth in the path of an asteroid, it's up to Sid the sloth and pals Manny and Diego to save the day. Animated sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, Denis Leary, John Leguizamo and Simon Pegg.(n)

programme.title: The Madness of King George (1994)
programme.desc: British monarch George III's behaviour becomes increasingly erratic, prompting fears that he is going insane. While physicians try to uncover the cause of his condition, the king's enemies in Parliament and the frustrated Prince of Wales conspire to have him declared insane and removed from the throne. Period drama based on Alan Bennett's play, starring Nigel Hawthorne, Helen Mirren and Rupert Everett.(n)

programme.title: Snowpiercer (2013)
programme.desc: In a snow-ravaged world, a group of travellers fight for survival on a train that perpetually circumnavigates the globe. The vehicle's occupants are divided into a military ruling elite and their dishevelled captives. But now, 17 years after the train set out on its seemingly never-ending journey, the downtrodden, abused captives have had enough. Revolution is afoot. Bong Joon Ho's fantasy thriller, starring Chris Evans, Song Kang-ho, Tilda Swinton, Jamie Bell and Octavia Spencer.(n)

programme.title: The Keeping Room (2014)
programme.desc: Three women living on an isolated farm during the American Civil War must defend their home from renegade Union soldiers using a mission to track down deserters as cover for murder, rape and robbery. Western, starring Brit Marling, Hailee Steinfeld, Muna Otaru and Sam Worthington.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff tries to prevent Audrey from giving a rug away to Adam and Jenn by telling them about the good times he has had on it. Comedy, starring Patrick Warburton and Megyn Price.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey decides to start a cookie business, while Timmy tries to fit in with the guys. Adam and Jennifer get high after finding some cannabis. Comedy, starring Megyn Price and Adhir Kalyan.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Bottling up her feelings of stress about school, relationship problems, and her social life, Sabrina gets involved in a protest to save a historical building.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.sub-title: Do You See What I See?
programme.desc: Paranormal-studies major Miles spots a flying car and gives a class presentation on it, but the students are less than thrilled with his UFO sighting.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe's friendship with Nate and Gillian is jeopardised when a secret is revealed, and Zander begs Ryder to let him move into the basement without Lennox's knowledge, after he drops out of art school. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox secretly dates her teaching assistant, and when Joe and Mel find out, they try to put an end to the relationship - only things do not go according to plan. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.sub-title: All's Flair in Love and War
programme.desc: Tucker's girlfriend Vanessa makes Ben's life miserable when she gets the assistant manager job at his bar, and tries to impose new hours and uniforms. However, he seizes an opportunity to get back at her by ruining a large event she is planning. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben's feelings are hurt when Riley wants to talk to Danny and not him about her bar exam woes, but she finally tells him that she has taken the test three times without passing. Determined to support his friend, Ben tries to convince her not to give up on her dreams of becoming a lawyer. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pair's friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As part of the relationship agreement, Sheldon reluctantly has to take care of Amy when she gets sick, but she loves the extra attention so much she pretends to remain in poor health. Elsewhere, Howard tries to get some tips on manliness from Penny when he and Bernadette go to visit her father.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly worries that the family's holiday traditions have grown stale, so she launches a new celebration called 'Super Hanukkah'. Feeling ignored by his older brother, Adam goes to great lengths to make Barry spend more time with him.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Barry team up to form a rap super-group just like the Beastie Boys. Beverly puts pressure on Murray to let her redesign the kitchen, but when he refuses to allow it she comes up with a devious plan.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct's staff prepare for an unusually busy night as the neighbourhood gets into the Halloween spirit, and Amy falls into a particularly foul mood when she is forced to wear a fancy-dress costume during an undercover operation. Meanwhile, Jake bets Captain Holt that he can steal his Medal of Valour before midnight - a challenge that prompts him to don his own selection of disguises.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake makes an arrest without much proof, and so has to spend the next 48 hours collecting enough evidence to keep his suspect in custody. While his co-workers are forced to help him out over the weekend, Charles judges a pie contest between Rosa and Gina, and the Captain gives advice to Terry, who has a problem involving his brother-in-law. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny do their best to divide up all their possessions into two separate households, but tension ensues. Raj and Stuart compete to become indispensable to Howard and Bernadette as the baby's arrival looms. Christopher Lloyd (Back to the Future) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's attempts to celebrate her birthday with an intimate night at home are interrupted by the news that Bernadette has gone into labour. However, it transpires that Howard, Raj and Stuart may have rushed the expectant mother to the hospital too early, with Raj having difficulty keeping the gender of the unborn child a secret.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is not so thrilled when Joe's mother Gloria drops by, but her fiance saves his anger for when his estranged brother Tony turns up and expects to be able to stay. Meanwhile, Lennox insists on helping Ryder get into college when he misses the application deadline. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.sub-title: You're the One That I Want
programme.desc: The weekend of Mel and Joe's wedding draws closer, but things are running far from smoothly as Joe is injured at his own bachelor party and Mel's father is missing. Meanwhile, Zander sees his friend make a move on Lennox. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker arranges for Danny to take part as a guest on Mary Hart's show, but his TV appearance takes a turn when he becomes emotional during the interview. Meanwhile, Ben and Riley have a misunderstanding about Angela. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: When Riley's company is hired to represent a preacher whose life has been hit by scandal, she is charged with making sure the man's wilful daughter stays out of trouble. Meanwhile, Bonnie's new career in real estate soon hits problems. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt invites the entire squad to his house to celebrate his birthday, but Jeffords struggles to keep everyone in line, with Peralta and Santiago making a bad impression on their host's husband Kevin. Meanwhile, Boyle's love of food leads to a romantic connection with an older woman, and Diaz introduces Gina to some psychologists - who find her to be a fascinating subject.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle's new girlfriend gives his self-confidence a boost, but Peralta is forced to intervene before his colleague gets too serious, too soon in the relationship. Meanwhile, Diaz and Santiago have trouble taking a costumed crimefighter seriously, and Holt faces a challenge to his leadership.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam picks a team of popular athletes over his own friends in gym class, his mates seek revenge by forcing their opponents to play a game of Dungeons and Dragons. Murray objects when Erica decides that she wants to go away from home to attend college. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Barry insists that Beverly always favours Adam, she tries to make amends by smothering her oldest son with affection - much to his horror. Murray is not happy about Erica's new boyfriend, a fanatical music fan who is trying to convert her to his way of thinking. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon pushes himself to the limit when he collaborates on two scientific projects - one with Leonard and Howard, plus another with Amy - on the same day. Bernadette nears the end of her maternity leave, and looks forward to returning to work.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette find it upsetting to leave baby Halley at the nursery when Bernadette returns to work at the end of her maternity leave. The gang's university colleague Bert the geologist introduces them to his attractive new girlfriend Rebecca.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Lomas relives a classic episode. Clare is holding a terrified Katy hostage as she waits to hear Justin's fate. However, Warren and Max are in hot pursuit as they come to Katy's rescue. Elsewhere, John Paul and Craig plan to go to Dublin, leaving Sarah distraught.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby takes the reins for the final night of the week's competition, with the Geordie Shore star aiming for a party finale with an après-ski-theme. The soirée kicks off with fondue and Charlotte impresses her guests with personalised poems, but after a disastrous DIY dessert she needs to save her night with some banging tunes and a live saxophone player.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy and Wil Wheaton get into a fight while filming Fun with Flags, Sheldon suffers the consequences of their fall-out. He ends up going to Penny for advice and after getting drunk, confronts the actor in a bid to make him apologise. Bernadette encourages Howard to move out of his mother's house.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends try to solve the mystery of Sheldon's post-lunch activities, following him to a secret room where they discover how he chills out. Elsewhere, Leonard is jealous when Penny starts texting a classmate, but things quickly change when Alex gets flirty with him.(n)

programme.title: Taken 2 (2012)
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Bryan Mills and his ex-wife Lenore are taken hostage in Istanbul by an Albanian gangster, whose son Bryan killed while bringing down a kidnapping ring. He is able to escape with the aid of his daughter, and together they fight to rescue Lenore and wipe out the criminal family. Action thriller sequel, starring Liam Neeson, Maggie Grace and Famke Janssen.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny hosts a Halloween costume party, which proves a worthy test for the boys' social skills. During the event, Leonard has a run-in with Penny's ex-boyfriend. Kaley Cuoco, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is forced to take Howard's place in the boys' video-game night while he is otherwise engaged with one of her promiscuous friends. Simon Helberg, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki star.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old Dom from Hampshire has been nominated for the show by his mum, in a desperate attempt to break his dismal dating record. Dom wants to find a partner who shares his love of adventure and isn't bothered by his posh boy charm. There's also 22-year-old pansexual Izzy, who is open to dating any gender, but with so much on offer, will she make the right choice?(n)

programme.desc: Adam and Jennifer plan a secret wedding, but a series of unfortunate events places it in jeopardy and they have to lie to Russell and Timmy to stop them finding out about the ceremony. Comedy, starring David Spade and Oliver Hudson.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement

The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant which often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners' lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon Ramsay instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Mother's boy Tiago plans to put his self-conscious bride Karlette on the big screen at his 1950s drive-in wedding. However, his attention-shunning fiancee wants her wedding day to be something intimate and contemporary.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

However, his straight-talking bride-to-be Lynsey is much more down to earth and has a very clear idea of the modest and intimate wedding she wants. While Mark aims to go above and beyond to make his wedding First Class, no nonsense Lynsey just hopes he is thinking about her first and foremost.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam joins a mail-order music club, aiming to assemble an enviable cassette tape collection. He takes advantage of the 12 tapes for a penny promotion by opening multiple accounts with the club using fake names to get as much music as possible, but has no intention of continuing the monthly contracts. However, when Beverly discovers the scam she blames Erica. Barry asks Murray for help when he realises Lainey's dad Bill doesn't like him.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang become concerned when Sheldon's former admirer, Dr Ramona Nowitzki, resurfaces while Amy is away working at Princeton University. Jim Parsons stars.(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2 (2011)

Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jack Black and Gary Oldman.(n)

programme.title: Taken 3 (2014)
programme.desc: In the final part of the blockbusting big-screen trilogy, ex-CIA agent Bryan Mills' efforts to finally live a quiet life are shattered by the death of his ex-wife, Lenore. Just when things seemingly can't get any worse, he is framed for her murder and must fight to clear his name. Taken 2 director Olivier Megaton returns for this action thriller sequel, starring Liam Neeson, Forest Whitaker, Maggie Grace and Dougray Scott.(n)
